nodes.label: .`getRecommendations prioritizes movies similar to recent history`()
.`getRelatedContent ranks shared genre ahead of category only matches`()
.`getMoviesByCategory does not hydrate xtream category when local cache is empty`()
.`getMoviesByCategory skips legacy xtream empty retry hydration`()
.`getMovieDetails uses fresh xtream hydrated cache without refetching`()
.`getMoviesByCategory lazily hydrates stalker category when local cache is empty`()
.`stalker movie preview loads only first page`()
.`getMovieDetails returns local data for stalker without full remote fetch`()
.`searchMovies returns empty list when sqlite throws for malformed fts query`()
.`searchMovies uses like fallback when fts has no rows`()
.`browseMovies top rated excludes unrated entries and uses filtered total count`()
